policy.description: Human-curated registry of real, verified sources for news-analysis draft generation. All entries must be real official documents found and verified by a human editor. No fabricated, inferred, or AI-generated source entries are allowed.
policy.how_to_add: Add a new object to the sources array below. All required_fields must be present. source_url must be the real URL of the official document. Run: node tools/ingest-news-sources.js --validate-only to check before committing.
